items.title: One of Arsenal's greatest unsung heroes - Keown's tribute to Manninger
items.summary: Former Arsenal defender Martin Keown pays tribute to his old friend and former Gunners team-mate Alex Manninger, who has died at the age of 48.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: UFC light heavyweight champ Carlos Ulberg undergoes surgery for torn ACL suffered in UFC 327 title fight
items.summary: Ulberg tore his ACL moments before knocking out Jiri Prochazka to claim the light heavyweight title
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Middlesex recover after poor start against Northants
items.summary: Zafar Gohar and Joe Cracknell share an unbroken 120-run stand as Middlesex recover to 284-6 before bad light ends play early against Northamptonshire.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
